description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean white walls and blue-framed windows and doors. The structure is two stories tall, with a flat roof and a prominent balcony on one side, accented by blue railings. The front yard is landscaped with a mix of palm trees, shrubs, and flowering plants, creating a lush, inviting entrance. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The property is enclosed by a low perimeter wall, with a main gate and a paved pathway leading to the entry. The rear of the house includes a spacious green lawn and additional potted plants, enhancing the residential feel.
description: A modern, two-story white house with blue accents, flat roof, balcony, and landscaped front and rear yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, lush landscaping, and blue-framed windows and doors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the balcony with blue railings, palm tree, and a window facing the side yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, multiple rooms, and minimal window openings on this side.
description_view_3: Backyard view with a large green lawn, potted plants, and a clear view of the balcony and rear windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, no steps, surrounded by lush landscaping and a low perimeter wall.
